name: zh-revival
description: Command and Conquer Generals Zero Hour community revival — open source rebuild

dependencies.name: zlib
dependencies.description: Replaces the gitignored ZLib source in Libraries/Source/Compression/ZLib/. Used by the Compression library for .big archive and save-file compression.
